# clerk_blocklist_identifier (Resource)

Manages a Clerk blocklist identifier. Blocklist identifiers prevent sign-ups from specific email addresses, phone numbers, or domains.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `identifier` (String) The identifier to blocklist (e.g. "@spam.com" for a domain, or a specific email address).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the blocklist entry was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the blocklist entry.
- `identifier_type` (String) Type of the identifier: email_address, phone_number, domain, or web3_wallet.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the blocklist entry was last updated.
